tasks.subject: Task 0: Schema, enums, migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the Webhook model + User.webhooks relation + WEBHOOK_EVENTS value-set, run additive migration.

**Files:** prisma/schema.prisma, lib/enums.ts, tests/unit/webhooks.schema.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "lib/enums.ts", "tests/unit/webhooks.schema.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:unit -- webhooks.schema", "acceptanceCriteria": ["additive migration created + client regenerated", "WEBHOOK_EVENTS exports the four events", "Webhook row create/query works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Secret encryption (lib/crypto.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AES-256-GCM reversible secret store keyed off WEBHOOK_SECRET_KEY, v0 plaintext fallback.

**Files:** lib/crypto.ts, tests/unit/crypto.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/crypto.ts", "tests/unit/crypto.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:unit -- crypto", "acceptanceCriteria": ["round-trips keyed (v1) and keyless (v0)", "tampered ciphertext throws", "prefix reflects key presence"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Outbox onDead hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Optional onDead(payload,lastError) callback on outbox registry, fired on terminal DEAD.

**Files:** lib/outbox.ts, tests/unit/outbox.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/outbox.ts", "tests/unit/outbox.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:unit -- outbox", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3-arg registerHandler stores onDead", "onDead fires once on exhaustion only", "throwing onDead does not break tick; job stays DEAD"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SSRF guard (validateWebhookUrl)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** validateWebhookUrl + isPrivateIp; prod requires https + blocks loopback/link-local/private; WEBHOOK_ALLOW_INSECURE escape hatch. Starts lib/webhooks.ts.

**Files:** lib/webhooks.ts, tests/unit/webhooks.ssrf.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/webhooks.ts", "tests/unit/webhooks.ssrf.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:unit -- webhooks.ssrf", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prod blocks http/loopback/link-local/private + bad URL", "non-prod allows http+localhost", "WEBHOOK_ALLOW_INSECURE bypasses in prod"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Webhook CRUD + dispatch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Owner-scoped CRUD + dispatch() enqueuing one webhook.deliver job per matching active webhook.

**Files:** lib/webhooks.ts, tests/unit/webhooks.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/webhooks.ts", "tests/unit/webhooks.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:unit -- webhooks.test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["create reveals secret once; list omits secretEnc", "dispatch enqueues one job per matching active webhook with correct envelope", "doc-scope + event-filter + inactive exclusion", "update/delete owner-scoped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Delivery handler + registerWebhookHandler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** webhook.deliver handler (HMAC sign + POST + status), onDeadWebhook sets DEAD, registerWebhookHandler.

**Files:** lib/webhooks.ts, tests/unit/webhooks.deliver.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/webhooks.ts", "tests/unit/webhooks.deliver.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:unit -- webhooks.deliver", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deterministic HMAC signBody", "2xx records 200 + headers present", "non-2xx throws + records status", "onDeadWebhook sets DEAD", "registerWebhookHandler registers handler+onDead"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Bootstrap wiring (instrumentation.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Call registerWebhookHandler() at server startup alongside email digest.

**Files:** instrumentation.ts, tests/unit/instrumentation.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["instrumentation.ts", "tests/unit/instrumentation.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:unit -- instrumentation", "acceptanceCriteria": ["registerWebhookHandler called once on nodejs", "no-op off nodejs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Management API routes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/webhooks, owner-only, POST returns secret once + validates URL.

**Files:** app/api/webhooks/route.ts, app/api/webhooks/[id]/route.ts, tests/unit/webhooks.routes.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/webhooks/route.ts", "app/api/webhooks/[id]/route.ts", "tests/unit/webhooks.routes.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:unit -- webhooks.routes", "acceptanceCriteria": ["401 unauth; 201 valid; 400 invalid url/events", "GET lists without secretEnc", "PATCH/DELETE owner-scoped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Event wiring (version/review/decision/comment)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** dispatch() alongside publish() in reviews/versions/annotations; synthesize decision.changed on state transition.

**Files:** lib/reviews.ts, lib/versions.ts, lib/annotations.ts, tests/unit/webhooks.wiring.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/reviews.ts", "lib/versions.ts", "lib/annotations.ts", "tests/unit/webhooks.wiring.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:unit -- webhooks.wiring", "acceptanceCriteria": ["review state-change fires review.updated + decision.changed", "version.created (+decision.changed when changed)", "comment fires comment.created", "dispatch calls best-effort, no regressions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Settings UI (WebhookManager)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** WebhookManager component + settings/webhooks page + subnav link.

**Files:** components/WebhookManager.tsx, app/app/settings/webhooks/page.tsx, app/app/settings/layout.tsx

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/WebhookManager.tsx", "app/app/settings/webhooks/page.tsx", "app/app/settings/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["page lists webhooks + status + create form + reveal-once secret + delete", "subnav Webhooks link present", "build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: End-to-end delivery + dead-letter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** e2e signed delivery + tamper against local sink; lib-level retry→dead-letter→DEAD.

**Files:** playwright.config.ts, tests/e2e/webhooks.spec.ts, tests/unit/webhooks.deadletter.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["playwright.config.ts", "tests/e2e/webhooks.spec.ts", "tests/unit/webhooks.deadletter.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test:unit -- webhooks.deadletter", "acceptanceCriteria": ["e2e sink receives correctly-signed decision.changed", "wrong-secret signature mismatch", "500 endpoint dead-letters → job DEAD + webhook lastStatus DEAD"]}
```
